description: Note to the Nagid Shemuel b. Ḥananya. In Judaeo-Arabic with some Hebrew. Concerning the items that have gone missing from a female orphan’s inheritance (or possibly trousseau, qumāsh). The Nagid is urged to 'act in solidarity with her for the sake of Heaven.' (Information in part from CUDL)
description_he: מכתב בHebrew, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק באוסף מוסרי.
